/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libinterfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so -o libinterfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/error__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/marker_status__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/kpic1__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/kpic2__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/robot2_control__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/robot2_status__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/vision_control__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/libfastrtps.so.2.1.1 /opt/ros/foxy/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.13 /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/libfoonathan_memory-0.6.2.a -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinyxml2.so -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinyxml2.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lrt
